topics: What is the Curiosity Science textbook about
How this book helps you learn Science
What kinds of activities and questions are in the book
subject: Science

sections.heading: 🧙 The Wizard's Scroll — What is This Book?
sections.body: Welcome, young hero! The book you hold is called 'Curiosity' — your magical scroll for Class 6 Science. It was made by NCERT to help you think, ask questions, and discover the world around you — just like a wizard learning new spells! It covers Biology, Chemistry, Physics, and Earth Science all together in one grand quest.
keyPoints: The book is called 'Curiosity' — Science Textbook for Class 6
It covers Biology, Chemistry, Physics, and Earth Science together
It was made by NCERT following the new education rules of NEP 2020

sections.heading: ⚔️ The Quest Begins — What Will You Learn?
sections.body: This book has 12 chapters — like 12 levels in a video game! Each chapter starts with a real-life story to make you curious, just like how seeing a cricket match makes you want to know how the ball swings. You will learn about matter, living things, health, hygiene, and how science connects to everyday life in India.
keyPoints: There are 12 chapters — each one is a new level in your quest
Topics include matter, living world, health, and science in society
Every chapter starts with a real story to spark your curiosity

sections.heading: 🐉 Defeating the Dragon — Learning by Doing, Not Just Reading
sections.body: In this quest, you don't defeat dragons by just reading about them — you fight by DOING! This book is full of hands-on activities, like experiments you can try at home or school. Instead of just memorising answers like a parrot, you will observe, think, and find out things yourself — just like a scientist making a new discovery!
keyPoints: The book focuses on doing activities, not just reading and memorising
You will observe, question, and explore — like a real scientist
Activities are designed so every student can participate and enjoy

sections.heading: ✨ Magic Spells of the Book — Special Sections to Power Up
sections.body: The book has special magic spells hidden in boxes! Look out for 'Do You Know?', 'More to Know!', 'Think It Over!', and 'More to Do!' — these are bonus powers that give you extra amazing facts and fun challenges. At the end of each chapter, 'Keywords' and a 'Summary' help you remember what you learned, like saving your progress in a game.
keyPoints: Special boxes give extra fun facts and challenges beyond the syllabus
Keywords at the end of each chapter help you remember key ideas
Summary at the end is like a quick recap — your quest checkpoint!

sections.heading: 🌟 Masters of the Realm — Indian Scientists and You
sections.body: Every great wizard has heroes to look up to! This book includes a section called 'Know a Scientist' that tells you about amazing Indian scientists and their discoveries. This shows you that heroes of science come from India too — just like cricket legends come from our country. You too can become a master of the science realm one day!
keyPoints: The book features Indian scientists to inspire young learners like you
Science is shown as something Indians have always been great at
You are encouraged to think of yourself as a future science hero!

summary: Young hero, your quest through Class 6 Science has officially begun! The 'Curiosity' textbook is your magical guide through 12 exciting chapters that cover Biology, Chemistry, Physics, and Earth Science. Instead of just reading and memorising like a robot, you will ask questions, do fun activities, and discover things yourself — just like a true wizard earning new powers. Special boxes, keywords, Indian scientist stories, and summaries are your power-ups along the way. Remember, every great scientist started just like you — curious, brave, and ready for the quest!
